target: Museum source/evidence fields for historical and technical claims
policy: Museum claims must expose source/evidence fields or remain unknown/unavailable; no historical or technical claim is backfilled without evidence.

checks.label: AI museum source list exists
checks.detail: Historical and technical AI claims must have explicit source entries.

checks.label: Museum renders source/evidence links
checks.detail: Source entries must be visible as external evidence links.

checks.label: Museum claim readiness asks for clear source or unknown state
checks.detail: Technical claims must expose source and validation expectations.

checks.label: NotebookLM video tracker keeps source/replacement evidence explicit
checks.detail: Video evidence must keep missing replacement data explicit.

checks.label: Museum tests lock evidence-bearing structures
checks.detail: Museum tests must cover historical and technical claim structures.
